home.title: Ace your California DMV written exam
home.subtitle: Free practice for the California Class C (car) and M1 (motorcycle) written tests — no signup needed.
home.heroImageAlt: A scenic California highway at sunset

questions.title: Real DMV-style questions
questions.body: Practice with questions that closely mirror the actual California DMV written exam format and difficulty.

mistakes.title: Mistakes tracked
mistakes.body: We automatically save questions you answer incorrectly so you can focus your review on weak areas.

mock.title: Mock exam simulator
mock.body: Experience the pressure of the real test with our timed, high-stakes simulator mode.

onboarding.title: Which test are you preparing for?
onboarding.subtitle: Pick the exam you want to study. You can switch anytime from the sidebar.
onboarding.error: Couldn't load exams. Please try again.

footer.copyright: © 2026 DMV Motor. Not affiliated with the California DMV.

studyHub.title: Study
studyHub.subtitle: Track what you've mastered and what's next.
studyHub.readinessTooltip: How close you are to being exam-ready — weighed from your overall performance, key-topic coverage, and whether your weak spots are cleared. It's deliberately conservative, so it won't jump on one good score.
studyHub.resumeBody: {answered} of {total} questions answered. Pick up where you left off.
studyHub.startBodyWithMistakes: You have {n} active mistakes across {t} topics — practice will surface them automatically.
studyHub.startBodyFresh: Ready to drill? Practice sessions personalize to your weak spots.
studyHub.practiceHistoryEmpty: No practice sessions yet — start one to build your history.
studyHub.practiceAggregate: {total} total sessions · {mistakes} active mistakes spanning {topics} topics.
studyHub.mockHistoryEmpty: No mock attempts yet. Take a mock to see your score trend.
studyHub.mockStatsNote: Submitted or timed-out only — exited / unfinished don't count
studyHub.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
studyHub.examOnboardingTitle: Which exam are you preparing for?
studyHub.examOnboardingBody: Pick your exam so practice, mock exams and progress are tailored to it. You can change it anytime in Settings.

dashboard.packSubtitle: Stay sharp by addressing your weakest points.
dashboard.noActiveTasks: Nothing to review right now — keep practising to surface tasks.
dashboard.noPassBody: Targeted drills on your weakest topics. Available with an access pass.
dashboard.readinessLocked: Get an access pass to unlock readiness scoring.
dashboard.ctaHint: Pick up where you left off.

auth.errorCreate: Could not create account. Try a different email or stronger password.
auth.resetSent: Check your inbox for a reset link.
auth.stuckBody: We couldn't confirm your sign-in. Refresh to retry, or go to sign in again.
auth.sessionExpiredBody: You've been signed out. Please sign in again to continue.

me.title: Settings
me.subtitle: Manage your account, subscription, and preferences.
me.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
me.sectionProfileBody: Read-only identity tied to your sign-in.
me.sectionExamBody: The exam you're preparing for. Changing it re-scopes your practice, mock exams and progress.
me.sectionLanguageBody: Used for question display and saved to your account.
me.sectionSubscriptionBody: Your access pass and remaining mock attempts.
me.sectionPaymentBody: Cards or wallets used for subscription billing.
me.sectionLearningBody: Reset your practice / mistake / review state to start a new study cycle.
me.learningResetWarn: This wipes mistakes, review packs, and progress for the current cycle. Mock attempt history is kept. Are you sure?
me.learningResetDone: Learning state reset. New cycle started.
me.sectionDangerBody: Sign out or delete your account.
me.signOutBody: Ends your session on this device.
me.deleteAccountBody: Permanently removes your account and learning data.

mock.title: Mock exam
mock.subtitle: 30 timed questions, real exam pressure. Score ≥ 85% to pass.
mock.noAttemptsLeft: You're out of mock attempts. Refresh your access pass to keep simulating.
mock.errorAuthRequired: Sign in to take a mock exam.
mock.errorPassRequired: An access pass is required to take a mock exam.
mock.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
mock.exitConfirm: Exit and consume this attempt? Your answers so far will be scored.
mock.exitConfirmBody: This attempt will be scored as-is and counted against your quota. You can't resume it.
mock.noWeakTopics: Even coverage — no specific weak topics flagged.
mock.exitedSummary: You exited this attempt before finishing, so it wasn't scored.
mock.aiExplainError: Couldn't get an explanation. Try again later.
mock.aiExplainCooldown: Give it a moment before asking again.
mock.aiExplainAuthRequired: Sign in to get an AI explanation.
mock.terminatedTitle: Exam ended — too many wrong answers
mock.terminatedBody: You answered {answered} questions ({wrong} wrong). The exam ends once wrong answers pass the fail threshold.
mock.aiPlanPrompt: Get a personalized review plan based on this exam.
mock.aiPlanUnavailable: AI review plans are currently unavailable.
mock.aiPlanStalled: Your review plan isn't ready yet — check back in a moment.
mock.aiPlanError: Couldn't generate a review plan. Try again later.

review.title: Review pack
review.subtitle: A daily set of tasks targeting your weakest topics. Complete them all to clear today's pack.
review.passRequired: An access pass is required for the review pack.
review.noTasks: Nothing to review right now — keep practising to surface tasks.
review.completedBody: You've finished this review task. Keep going on the rest of the pack.

mistakes.title: Active mistakes
mistakes.subtitle: Questions you've answered incorrectly. They drop off automatically once you reach mastery in a topic.
mistakes.empty: No active mistakes — keep practising to surface weak areas.
mistakes.practiceTheseHint: Drill a session focused on the {n} topics from your active mistakes.
mistakes.aiExplainError: Couldn't get an explanation. Try again later.
mistakes.aiExplainCooldown: Give it a moment before asking again.
mistakes.aiExplainAuthRequired: Sign in to get an AI explanation.

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: How close you are to passing — broken down by what counts.
progress.completionHint: How much of the catalog you've engaged with.
progress.readinessHint: Pass-ready when score ≥ 85% with all gates clear.
progress.readinessLockedBody: Get an access pass to see how close you are to passing the real exam, with detailed gates and recommendations.
progress.gatesSubtitle: All four must clear before you're pass-ready.

MOCK_SCORE_NOT_STABLE.label: Stable mock scores
MOCK_SCORE_NOT_STABLE.body: Take at least 2 mock exams with an average score ≥ 85%.

KEY_COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE.label: Key topic coverage
KEY_COVERAGE_INCOMPLETE.body: Cover ≥ 90% of must-know questions across key topics.

HIGH_RISK_REVIEW_LOW.label: High-risk review
HIGH_RISK_REVIEW_LOW.body: Complete ≥ 80% of your review pack tasks.

PERSISTENT_WEAK_POINT.label: No persistent weak points
PERSISTENT_WEAK_POINT.body: Resolve any topic where you've missed the same idea repeatedly.

progress.noWeakTopics: No weak topics detected — keep practising to surface any gaps.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Free-trial questions are open to everyone. Sign in for full coverage.
practice.subtitleSignedInNoPass: You're signed in. Practice the free-trial set anytime, or get an access pass to unlock the full bank.
practice.subtitlePaid: Practice the full bank. Your progress is saved to your account.
practice.completedBody: You've answered every question in this pool.
practice.exitedBody: You ended this session early. Your answered questions are saved, but the rest of the pool can't be resumed.
practice.exitConfirmBody: If you exit now, this session ends and you won't be able to continue the remaining questions. Already-answered questions are saved.
practice.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
practice.errorAuthRequired: Sign in to start a full practice session.
practice.signInPrompt: Want full coverage and saved progress?
practice.signInForFull: Sign in for full coverage and saved progress, or continue with the free-trial set.
practice.freeTrialBody: 30 hand-picked questions covering the basics. Jump in and answer — your selections aren't saved without an account.
practice.errorPassRequired: An access pass is required for full practice.
practice.reviewHistoryEmpty: No answers yet — submit one to start your history.
practice.aiExplainAuthRequired: Sign in to use AI explanations.
practice.aiExplainCooldown: AI is cooling down. Try again in a moment.
practice.aiExplainError: Couldn't generate an AI explanation. Try again later.
